diagrams.title: Operator Precedence Pyramid
diagrams.description: A hierarchical pyramid showing operators from highest precedence at top to lowest at bottom
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the complete precedence hierarchy to understand which operators are evaluated first

diagrams.title: Associativity Direction Chart
diagrams.description: Shows which operators are left-associative vs right-associative
elements: LEFT-TO-RIGHT (←): Arithmetic (*/+/-), Relational, Equality, Bitwise, Logical, Ternary (?)
diagrams.purpose: Remember which operators evaluate from left to right vs right to left

diagrams.title: Expression Evaluation Tree
diagrams.description: Tree diagram showing how 2 + 3 * 4 is evaluated step by step
elements: Shows * evaluated before + based on precedence
diagrams.purpose: Understand how complex expressions are parsed and evaluated
